# Getting to value faster with Digital Trust & Safety

Every business has the opportunity to be successful with enough time—and that’s exactly what most businesses don’t have. Being a categorical leader…

![Sift Author Logo](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20504%20504'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Sift Trust and Safety Team

May 30, 2023

![black-dot](https://sift.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/black-dot.svg)

![Press-Release-Tile-Image-Color-Pills\_Blue](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201024%20683'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Every business has the opportunity to be successful with enough time—and that’s exactly what most businesses don’t have. Being a categorical leader in any corner of digital solutions or services hinges on two major deliverables: being able to quickly solve complex problems at scale, and translating how you’re solving those challenges to customers. 

Leading online businesses deliver solutions that make sense to users from first login, clearly address pain points, and include features that demonstrate value quickly. To be successful, they need the tools they rely on to do the same. Our recently launched **Sifters Community** for customers, coupled with new **Starter Workflows**, let risk teams onboard quickly and realize measurable benefits from fraud operations in a matter of days, rather than having to wait weeks or months.      

## Starter Workflows: Custom or configured, made to scale

Stack management, cost-effectiveness, and ramp time to results always matter, but when budgets and teams get smaller, they become critical for success. To stay ahead of risk, fraud operations (and the cost of orchestrating them) have to align with tangible value; analysts need speed, simplicity, and proven strategies to make that happen. And ultimately, the business has to be able to control fraud rates and losses, increase order acceptance, and win more disputes in the short- and long-term.

New Starter Workflows are preset versions of Sift’s popular Workflowsfeature, allowing businesses to start automating risk-based decisioning at scale—and dynamically throughout the user journey—in less than two weeks. Starter Workflows are easy to set up, customizable, and available through our Implementation Consultants. Payment Protection customers can also access an exclusive guide to help kickstart execution.

## Sifters: An always-on, global community of shared fraud intelligence

Frontline fraud fighters deserve to have an open and supportive ecosystem of resources. The Sifters community portal connects Sift’s network of customers and data with our human network of platform users, partners, and internal experts. 

This centralized hub for sharing industry insights and addressing cross-market challenges highlights a diverse spectrum of perspectives and experiences, giving risk professionals what they need to enable smarter business decisions and maintain a competitive edge—all based on peer and product insights.

Sifters also provides real-time data and support for risk professionals to learn from each other and help one another succeed. By leveraging the collective intelligence of fraud fighters across multiple markets and regions, Sifters members gain access to emerging industry information and intel about changing fraud trends, giving them a chance to address threats before they cost customers and revenue. They can also share product tips, receive guidance from our team of Trust and Safety Architects, and access exclusive educational resources outlining proven fraud prevention practices.

With access to industry-proven workflows and continuous support from peers and product experts, businesses can rely on Sift and our global ecosystem to accelerate time-to-value across fraud operations. From cultivating trust with customers to protecting more revenue at scale, risk teams using our platform contribute to rapid growth, and help their businesses stay competitive in a fluid digital landscape. **Talk to an expert today.**
